Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 accessible; box_1 on top of box_2; red box must not be pushed.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped; red box has not been pushed.

Precondition: box_1 is grasped; red box must not be pushed.
Postcondition: box_1 placed on table; box_2 top is unblocked; red box has not been pushed.

Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 accessible; box_2 top unblocked; red box must not be pushed.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped; red box has not been pushed.
